title: Gu
overview: Gu follows the fearless eight-year-old Minna on her first visit to her dads ancestral home where she becomes enthralled by the legend of Gulikan, a spectral presence rumored to appear anytime, day or night.  When her cousin Paru falls under the grip of an evil entity, Minna and her cousins embark on a courageous mission to banish the malevolent force
